subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast circled round the Concourse on High! All praise be to God that thou wert, for a time, an intimate companion and close associate in this blessed Spot [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طائف مطاف ملا اعلی حمد خدا را که چندی درین بقعه مبارکه همدم و همنشین بودی
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @petitions to authorities, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @praise and encouragement, @call to action
